sources.title: NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2026
sources.evidence_summary: NVIDIA reported fiscal 2026 revenue of $215.9B, up 65% year over year, and published GAAP income statement data for fiscal 2026. This supports historical revenue and profitability context but does not independently validate forward P/E or PEG claims.
limitations: Does not provide third-party forward estimates.
Does not validate PEG or forward P/E calculations by itself.

sources.title: NVIDIA Sets Conference Call for First-Quarter Financial Results
sources.evidence_summary: NVIDIA stated it will host its first-quarter fiscal 2027 financial-results conference call on Wednesday, May 20, 2026, after results are announced.

sources.title: Classified Networks AI Agreements
sources.evidence_summary: The official release states that SpaceX, OpenAI, Google, NVIDIA, Reflection, Microsoft, AWS, and Oracle entered agreements to deploy advanced AI capabilities on classified networks for lawful operational use.
limitations: Does not quantify NVIDIA-specific revenue, margin, or contract value.

sources.title: US stocks rally to the finish of their best month since 2020, even as oil prices whipsaw
sources.evidence_summary: AP reported that the S&P 500 rallied to close out its best month in more than five years, with the Nasdaq also reaching a record, while oil prices were volatile amid the war with Iran.
limitations: Does not validate all geopolitical details in the TradingAgents text.

sources.title: Fed holds rates steady amid the most dissents in decades
sources.evidence_summary: Axios reported that the Federal Reserve left its target rate range unchanged at 3.5% to 3.75% and highlighted unusually high internal dissent.
limitations: Secondary source; official FOMC statement should be added in a later provider pass.

sources.title: NVIDIA Q1 2027 Earnings Report
sources.evidence_summary: MarketBeat lists NVDA Q1 2027 consensus EPS of $1.76, expected revenue of $78.42B, and conference-call timing on May 20, 2026.
limitations: Does not validate the TradingAgents forward P/E or PEG figures directly.

sources.title: Why Shares of Micron Technology Shot Up 53% Last Month
sources.evidence_summary: The article states that Micron shares rose 53% in April and frames memory-chip demand as tied to the AI growth supercycle.
limitations: Sector proxy only; does not directly validate NVIDIA revenue or margins.

sources.title: Vertiv Q1 FY2026: AI Infrastructure Demand Drives 83% EPS Surge
sources.evidence_summary: The article reports Vertiv adjusted EPS growth of 83% year over year and links pipeline/backlog strength to AI data center deployments.
limitations: Sector proxy only; should be supplemented with Vertiv primary filings or release.

claim_links.rationale: The official government release directly names NVIDIA among companies entering classified-network AI agreements. Financial impact remains unquantified.
unresolved_requirements: Quantify NVIDIA-specific revenue, duration, and margin impact before using this as a valuation input.

claim_links.rationale: Historical fiscal results and one secondary estimates source support the existence of forward estimate context, but they do not directly validate the forward P/E or PEG values stated by TradingAgents.
unresolved_requirements: Add a verified estimates provider or compute forward valuation from explicitly sourced price, shares, EPS, and growth assumptions.

claim_links.rationale: Sources support AI memory and data-center infrastructure strength, but these are indirect proxies and cannot by themselves validate NVIDIA-specific demand or earnings.
unresolved_requirements: Add primary Micron and Vertiv filings/releases or transcript excerpts.
Map proxy relevance explicitly to NVIDIA revenue segments.

claim_links.rationale: Sources support broad market strength, oil/geopolitical volatility, and Fed hold/division. They do not validate every geopolitical assertion in the TradingAgents text.
unresolved_requirements: Add government or energy-market source for oil reserve and geopolitical claims.

claim_links.rationale: NVIDIA IR directly confirms the May 20, 2026 first-quarter fiscal 2027 call; MarketBeat independently aligns with the same date.
